items.title: Stock Market LIVE: Sensex rises 190 pts, Nifty near 25,950; IT, PSBs lag, Pharma gains
items.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE Updates: In the broader markets, the Nifty MidCap index gained 0.21 per cent and the Nifty SmallCap index rose 0.49 per cent

items.title: India's consumer inflation likely rose to 2.4% in Jan on food prices: Poll
items.description: January will be the first month of a new data series based on 2024 prices and will mark the first time since August that inflation returns to the Reserve Bank of India's (RBI) 2% - 6% target band

items.title: How will HUL fare in Q3 post-ice cream biz demerger? Analysts weigh
items.description: Brokerages tracked by Business Standard estimate HUL's net profit to average ₹2,568.5 crore, compared to ₹2,541 crore a year ago, up 1 per cent year-on-year (Y-o-Y)

items.title: Asian stocks rise for second day as Nikkei sets fresh record, dollar drops
items.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Monday that senior ‌US Treasury staff visited China last week "to strengthen channels of ​communication" between Washington and Beijing

items.title: Stocks to Watch today: Aurobindo Pharma, BSE, Eternal, Pfizer, Trident
items.description: Stocks to watch today, Tuesday, February 10, 2026: Aurobindo Pharma, BSE, Eternal, Pfizer, and Trident shares are in focus on Tuesday

items.title: Auto sector momentum builds; MOFSL prefers TVS, Maruti Suzuki as top stocks
items.description: India's auto sector starts 2026 with strong demand across PVs, 2Ws, CVs and tractors. MOFSL prefers TVS Motor and Maruti Suzuki.

items.title: Stocks picks, Feb 10: Kotak Sec recommends JSW Steel, Acutaas Chemicals
items.description: Stocks to buy, Feb 10: JSW Steel offers strong volume growth and margin recovery potential, while Acutaas Chemicals benefits from robust CDMO-led earnings momentum, says Shrikant Chouhan of Kotak Sec

items.title: India-US trade deal to boost auto suppliers, says Nomura; lists top winners
items.description: Nomura said the combination of lower duties and a weaker Indian rupee increases global competitiveness for auto suppliers such as Bharat Forge, Sansera, Sonacoms, Belrise Industries, and Motherson

items.title: Bata India shares jump 8% on posting Q3 results; PAT up 13% YoY
items.description: In the December quarter, Bata India Ltd reported a 12.61 per cent rise in consolidated net profit to ₹66.1 crore, compared to ₹58.7 crore a year ago

items.title: This auto components stock hit new high, reported 50% jump in US exports
items.description: With US-India trade deal on the horizon coupled with healthy diversification efforts at the company (ADS), Sansera Engineering remains one of top pick in the auto ancillary space for ICICI Securities.

items.title: BSE shares jump 6%, hit all-time high after posting strong Q3 results
items.description: The buying on the counter came after BSE released its Q3FY26 numbers on Monday, after market hours

items.title: Is UGRO Capital your next growth stock? Elara says 'Buy', 66% upside eyed
items.description: Elara Capital has initiated coverage on UGRO Capital with a Buy rating and a target price of ₹226, based on 1.2x FY27E book value

items.title: MTAR Tech surges 49% in 12 days, zooms 156% from August low; here's why
items.description: With strong growth visibility over the next few years, the MTAR management has increased its FY26 revenue growth guidance to 30-35% and maintained its EBITDA margin outlook at around 21%.

items.title: Microcap stocks in demand; Sterlite Tech, ISGEC Heavy zoom up to 20%
items.description: In the past two trading days, the Nifty Microcap 250 index has rallied 3.7 per cent, as against 1 per cent gain in the benchmark Nifty 50.

items.title: Chart check: Analyst expects further 9% gain in this insurance stock
items.description: GIC RE stock has witnessed a falling trendline breakout after a phase of strong consolidation on the daily chart, says Om Mehra, technical research analyst at SAMCO Securities.

items.title: ITC's cigarette price hikes may cushion volumes, but hurt margins: Nomura
items.description: In the case of ITC, Nomura noted that the company has started increasing prices for its premium brands, including Gold Flake and Classic, across most subsegments

items.title: Navin Fluorine stock sees volatility post Q3 nos; JM Financial up TP by 24%
items.description: Navin Fluorine stock jumped 5.6 per cent to an intra-day high of ₹6,965, before slipping into the negative zone on the NSE in Tuesday's trade even as the company's net profit more-than-doubled in Q3.

items.title: Pfizer shares jump 11% on posting healthy Q3 show; PAT up 11% YoY, Rev 20%
items.description: In the December quarter, Pfizer reported an 11 per cent rise in consolidated net profit to ₹1,41.84 crore, compared to ₹127.6 crore a year ago

items.title: Delivery platform stocks: Eternal, Swiggy surge up to 6% on huge volumes
items.description: However, in the past six months, Swiggy (down 13 per cent) and Eternal (down 1 per cent) have underperformed the Sensex (up 5 per cent), amid concerns regarding increased competition

items.title: Gold ETF inflows double MoM to ₹24,040 crore in January, surpass equities
items.description: The January inflow in Gold ETFs exceeded - albeit by a whisker - the net investment in 'growth/equity-oriented' schemes in January, which stood at Rs 24,028.59 crore, AMFI data showed

items.title: Lenskart Solutions shares rise 2% in trade; JM Financial initiates 'Buy'
items.description: JM Financial Institutional Securities has initiated coverage on Lenskart Solutions with 'Buy' for a target of ₹535 per share

items.title: JM Financial flags growth concerns in Mankind Pharma; initiates with Reduce
items.description: JM Financial raised concerns around Mankind Pharma's recent BSV acquisition, which was executed at a high valuation and is expected to dilute return on capital

items.title: Angel One AMC launches Silver ETF, Fund of Fund: All you need to know
items.description: Angel One Silver ETF will allow investment through NSE on an ongoing basis, while the FoF will allow participation even without a demat account.

items.title: Sebi stalls India's newest exchanges from entering options market
items.description: Late ​last year, the NCDEX and the MSE separately sought approval from the Sebi to launch and develop equity cash and derivative products, according to exchange disclosures

items.title: Brandman Retail IPO booked 114x; here's what GMP hints for D-St debut
items.description: The unlisted shares of Brandman Retail were trading at ₹191 each, reflecting a GMP of ₹15, or 8.5 per cent above the upper end of the ₹167-₹176 price band

items.title: Pearl Global, Arvind, Gokaldas, Vardhman down up to 9%; here's why
items.description: Despite today's decline, in the past one month, these stocks have outperformed the market, surging up to 33 per cent, as against 0.56 per cent rise in the benchmark Sensex.

items.title: Amber Enterprises share price rises 7% after Q3 net profit jumps 128% YoY
items.description: Amber Enterprises stock rose as much as 6.7 per cent to ₹7,517 apiece, its highest level since December 4, 2025 on the National Stock Exchange (NSE).
